nodes.name: 菲利普·斯克莱特

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The streak-throated bush tyrant (Myiotheretes striaticollis) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela.Remsen, J
